name: GSR II Meteora Acquisition Corp. Right
summary: GSR II Meteora Acquisition Corp. Right is related to GSR II Meteora Acquisition Corp., likely representing the right to purchase shares of the company under certain conditions, as part of the initial public offering or a subsequent offering. These rights are typically granted to investors as an incentive to participate in the offering. The specifics of the rights, such as the exercise price and expiration date, would be detailed in the offering documents.
